title: TrustGuard
summary: A secure, embeddable set of identity and verification widgets for marketplaces and platforms.
overview: TrustGuard gives product teams a reusable trust layer for onboarding, verification, and confidence-building flows. It is designed to fit inside existing marketplaces, SaaS dashboards, and customer portals without forcing a redesign of the host application.
capabilities: Inline identity capture and review states
Flexible integration into existing design systems
Conversion-friendly trust signals for checkout and onboarding
builtFor: Marketplaces, platforms, and SaaS products that need to prove legitimacy fast.

title: InsightHub
summary: A lightweight analytics dashboard focused on conversions, funnels and campaign attribution.
overview: InsightHub is a compact analytics surface for teams that want practical decision-making tools instead of noisy dashboards. It surfaces the numbers that matter most: traffic quality, funnel drop-off, campaign performance, and conversion signals.
capabilities: Responsive dashboard cards for mobile and desktop

traditional: Dense dashboards with too many metrics

builtFor: Founders, growth teams, and operators who need a clear view of performance.

title: FormsFlow
summary: No-code form builder with conditional flows, webhooks and submission pipelines.
overview: FormsFlow turns static forms into guided workflows. It is built for teams that need capture, qualification, and routing in one clean experience, with conditional logic and integrations handled behind the scenes.
capabilities: Reusable form blocks for websites and portals

traditional: No branching logic or follow-up control
withTechWisdom: Conditional logic that qualifies users faster

builtFor: Lead capture, intake, and workflow-heavy teams that want less friction.
